summary: Frontend testing completed for Appeal Case Manager iteration 111. All 8 features tested and verified as working correctly.

test_1_chat_toggle_position.description: Chat toggle button is positioned at bottom-LEFT (x=24, bottom-6 left-6)

test_2_report_card_4_buttons.description: Quick Summary report card shows 4 action buttons: Full Report Page, PDF, Word, Print

test_3_page_1_static_text_removed.description: Static 'Page 1' text removed from all export HTML footers (ReportView, BarristerView, TimelineEnhanced, GroundsOfMerit). Only CSS counter(page) used in @media print
test_3_page_1_static_text_removed.verified_by: Code review - grep search found no 'Page 1' static text

test_4_print_footer_content.description: Print footer contains report title, appellant name, and date. Format: 'Criminal Appeal Case Management - ${title} on ${defendantName} - ${previewDate}'

test_5_branding_footer.description: Branding footer (scales icon + Appeal Case Manager + Founded by Debra King + Criminal Appeal Research Tool) appears after NOT LEGAL ADVICE disclaimer in all export HTML views
test_5_branding_footer.verified_by: Code review - ReportView.jsx lines 825-837, BarristerView.jsx lines 720-732, TimelineEnhanced.jsx lines 276-287, GroundsOfMerit.jsx lines 215-228

test_6_pdf_iframe_auto_resize.description: DocumentPreviewPage iframe auto-sizes to content height using scrollHeight + 40px with minHeight 90vh

test_7_word_export.description: Word export button downloads .docx file successfully (report_rpt_66f34314b465.docx)

test_8_barrister_view_export_buttons.description: BarristerView page has all 3 export buttons: Print (barrister-print-button), Word (barrister-export-docx-button), PDF (barrister-export-pdf-button)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 features from iteration 111 have been verified. Chat toggle is at bottom-left, report cards have 4 action buttons (Full Report, PDF, Word, Print), Page 1 static text removed from footers, branding footer appears after disclaimer, iframe auto-resizes, Word export works, BarristerView has 3 export buttons.
